title: Red Blood Cell (RBC) Count: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
are immature (still developing) red blood cells. This test helps check if your bone marrow is making the right amount of red blood cells. 
Iron tests , which measure iron levels in your blood. Iron Â is essential for making red blood cells. 
Vitamin B test , which measures the amount of one or more B vitamins in your blood. B vitamins are important for making red blood cells and keeping your body healthy.
